message:
feat: implement userEnvProbe property for shell type detection

Add support for the userEnvProbe property which specifies which shell
type to use when probing the container environment (e.g., detecting
user, home directory).

Valid values:
- "none" - Don't use shell flags when probing
- "loginShell" - Use login shell (sh -l -c)
- "interactiveShell" - Use interactive shell (sh -i -c)
- "loginInteractiveShell" - Use both flags (sh -l -i -c) (default)

Changes:
- Add UserEnvProbe field to devcontainer.Config struct
- Add UserEnvProbe field to userdetect.DevcontainerConfig struct
- Implement getShellFlags() to generate appropriate shell flags
- Update detectRuntimeUserDirectWithProbe() to use shell flags
- Update DetectContainerUser() to pass userEnvProbe setting
- Update all callers to pass UserEnvProbe from config
- Add comprehensive tests for userEnvProbe parsing and shell flag generation

Following TDD methodology with full test coverage.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
